0.1.0.en: Initial release of the TP-Link Managed Switch app. Provides basic control and monitoring for TP-Link managed switches. Supports discovery of devices on the network and integration with Homey.

0.1.2.en: Added monitoring of switch port link changes. Port link status is checked once per minute, so rapid topology changes may not be detected.

0.1.3.en: Updated supported hardware list and added it to the error message when pairing.

0.1.4.en: Fixed a crash that could occur if the app has an error during the app loading process. Fixed a bug that allowed the app to repair and save incorrect login credentials when the password was recently correct. Fixed a bug so that the app can repair a switch that had the wrong credentials at app startup. Corrected some pairing and repair logic. Improved repair speed. Fixed a few typos.
